title: 日本ダービーの後に・恐るべき一等星

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I was... no match for... Ayabe. She's so strong...

Her strength doesn't stop at maintaining massive
leads over the others. It also shows in her passion,
and this race proved it.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I'm sure... you knew this all along, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
It wasn't my time to take on the Derby. But... this
has been a memorable experience, nonetheless.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I want to say my thanks, but I'm too much of a
coward to do anything...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm the same as ever—slow, wimpy, and clumsy.
But I realized... I don't want to stay like this.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yes... Maybe I can't smile at this experience
just yet, but...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
One day, I hope to find the fun in big races like
this, so I can... walk away smiling... Nghhh...

Meisho Doto experiences a chapter of defeat in
her story. But, perhaps it is a chapter that will
lead to better things.
